SEARCH
Module storm.core
Package st.orm.core.spi

Interface ORMConverter

All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultORMConverterImpl
public interface ORMConverter
Interface for converting ORM parameters to SQL parameters.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    ORMConverter.NameResolver
    Interface for resolving names of record components.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Object
    fromDatabase(Object[] values, RefFactory refFactory)
    Converts the given values to an object that is used in the object model.
    List<Name>
    getColumns(ORMConverter.NameResolver nameResolver)
    Returns the names of the columns that will be used in the SQL template.
    default int
    getParameterCount()
    Returns the number of parameters in the SQL template.
    List<Class<?>>
    getParameterTypes()
    Returns the types of the parameters in the SQL template.
    List<Object>
    toDatabase(Object record)
    Converts the given record to a list of values that can be used in the SQL template.

  • Method Details

    • getParameterCount

      default int getParameterCount() throws SqlTemplateException
      Returns the number of parameters in the SQL template.

      Note: The count must match the parameter as returned by getParameterTypes().

      Returns:
      the number of parameters.
      Throws:
      SqlTemplateException

    • getParameterTypes

      List<Class<?>> getParameterTypes() throws SqlTemplateException
      Returns the types of the parameters in the SQL template.
      Returns:
      a list of parameter types.
      Throws:
      SqlTemplateException

    • getColumns

      List<Name> getColumns(@Nonnull ORMConverter.NameResolver nameResolver) throws SqlTemplateException
      Returns the names of the columns that will be used in the SQL template.

      Note: The names must match the parameters as returned by getParameterTypes().

      Returns:
      a list of column names.
      Throws:
      SqlTemplateException

    • toDatabase

      List<Object> toDatabase(@Nullable Object record) throws SqlTemplateException
      Converts the given record to a list of values that can be used in the SQL template.

      Note: The values must match the parameters as returned by getParameterTypes().

      Parameters:
      record - the record to convert.
      Returns:
      the values to be used in the SQL template.
      Throws:
      SqlTemplateException

    • fromDatabase

      Object fromDatabase(@Nonnull Object[] values, @Nonnull RefFactory refFactory) throws SqlTemplateException
      Converts the given values to an object that is used in the object model.
      Parameters:
      values - the arguments to convert. The arguments match the parameter types as returned by getParameterTypes().
      refFactory - the factory for creating references to entities.
      Returns:
      the converted object.
      Throws:
      SqlTemplateException - if an error occurs during conversion.
